## Feature Under Test
*Which feature or area does this plan cover?*

## Scope
*What IS included in this test plan.*

## Out of Scope
*What is NOT being tested here, and why.*

## Test Environment
*Where will these tests be run? What browser/device/setup?*

|---|-----------|-------|-----------------|-----------|

| # | Test Case | Steps | Expected Result | Pass/Fail |
|---|-----------|-------|-----------------|-----------|

## Risks & Assumptions
*What are you assuming? What might you have missed?*
